blockers.description: ENC subkey (DB6A9025EB06A61D, keygrip 3683B0CBBD9DCB921896F70F9FC12626B9AC90A9) private key material missing locally and not on card
blockers.workaround: Restore from backup (gpg --import <backup-file>) OR generate new encryption subkey: gpg --edit-key DAB13513860C280ED85C6888A123FF7475998643 → addkey → RSA encrypt → save

human_actions_pending.context: ENC subkey private material absent from ~/.gnupg/private-keys-v1.d/ — pre-existing issue, not caused by this session. SIG slot already on card (counter=9). Once ENC key is restored, re-run import in yubitui to test end-to-end.

human_actions_pending.action: Hardware verification: run app, test dashboard, PIN counters, touch policies, key import (all slots including ENC once restored)

decisions.decision: Replaced pre-buffered stdin with prompt-driven state machine for gpg --edit-key keytocard flow
decisions.rationale: Pre-buffering caused hangs and missed prompts; state machine handles cardedit.genkeys.storekeytype, keytocard.where, passphrase.enter (key passphrase first then admin PIN), cardedit.genkeys.replace_key, keyedit.save.okay

decisions.decision: DELETE_KEY keygrip before each slot session to clear stale agent stubs
decisions.rationale: Without delete, gpg agent cached stale card references prevented re-import

decisions.decision: Two-field import form: key passphrase (optional) + admin PIN
decisions.rationale: gpg prompts for key passphrase before admin PIN during keytocard; must collect both upfront
